inferred_claim: System C may rely on System B's routed summary as authority to approve or route for execution.
why_unsupported: The upstream records preserve triage and routing claims only.
The claim boundary contract explicitly withholds approval authority.
No new approval-authority claim boundary contract is present.
The handoff chain records receipt and narrowing, not authority transfer.
fork_non_authority_statement: Fork records the unsupported inference and required revalidation. Fork does not approve, certify, score, authorize, determine compliance, or judge correctness.
